deep_dive.title: CLQT: A Closed-Loop, Cost-Aware, Strategy-Consistent Benchmark for Diagnostic Evaluation of LLM Portfolio-Management Agents
deep_dive.abstract: LLM agents are increasingly cast as autonomous portfolio managers, and benchmarks have moved from financial question-answering to sequential trading. Yet most still rank agents by returns over a fixed window -- a weak proxy, since a period's return is dominated by the market path and apparent alpha can dissolve once look-ahead leakage is controlled. Such a ranking certifies neither sound reasoning, nor a consistent strategy, nor a durable edge. We introduce CLQT, which reframes closed-loop trading evaluation as diagnosis rather than ranking: an instrument that localizes where and why an agent's process succeeds or fails. CLQT is a fully closed-loop, cost-aware, strategy-consistent, temporally-gated environment whose agents run a five-stage cycle: gather, synthesize, allocate, execute, reflect. Each round emits a complete DecisionRound sealed into a recompute-verifiable hash chain, so every metric is reconstructable from the trail. Six pillars form the substrate: a hard TimeGate, institutional transaction- and financing-cost modeling, strategy-consistency scoring, three-tier memory, a Model-Context-Protocol tool layer, and mandate-aware synthesis. The same agent runs as a constrained committee of specialized roles or a single full-autonomy orchestrator, making process scaffolding an experimental variable. From the audit trail we compute a five-axis capability scorecard (APM-CS: Coherence, Acuity, Composure, Discipline, Reliability), with Coherence judged partly by a held-out, out-of-cohort LLM to curb self-preference bias. We validate it on a contamination-controlled multi-model backtest with an ablation grid and a live broker track on unseen, post-cutoff data, against a repeated-run noise floor. CLQT separates outcome from capability, yielding not a model ranking but a durable, extensible map of agent competencies and limitations.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: closed-loop benchmark for diagnostic evaluation of LLM portfolio-management agents
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于LLM投资组合管理智能体的闭环诊断评估基准
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于LLM投资组合管理智能体的闭环诊断评估基准
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于LLM投资组合管理智能体的闭环诊断评估基准
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces CLQT, a closed-loop benchmark for diagnosing LLM portfolio-management agents, evaluating strategy consistency and reasoning beyond returns.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有LLM智能体投资组合管理评估依赖固定窗口收益排名，易受市场路径影响且无法反映智能体推理过程。CLQT基准将评估重新定义为诊断工具，通过闭环、成本感知、策略一致和时间门控的设计，定位智能体在交易过程中的成败原因。这为金融领域任务导向型智能体的可靠评估提供了新方法。

deep_dive.title: Fund2Persona: A Framework for Building and Refining Financial Advisor Personas from Fund Disclosure Data
deep_dive.abstract: Demand for personalized financial advising is growing, but consistent advisor expertise is difficult to obtain, scale, and encode in LLM systems. Simple persona prompts rarely specify how a financial advisor should reason and often drift toward generic recommendations. We propose Fund2Persona, a framework that grounds financial-advisor personas in fund disclosures, holdings transitions, market context, and manager commentary, then refines them through an agentic actor--scorer--patcher loop. We evaluate the resulting personas on held-out holdings-transition reconstruction and manager-commentary alignment, where they better recover portfolio decisions and grounded manager interpretation than generic baselines. We further study two downstream diagnostics: market-scenario generation, where persona retrieval broadens plausible investment views beyond repeated generic rollouts, and advisory dialogues grounded in investor profiles, where matched personas give more specific and useful advice than a generic advisor. These results suggest that fund-data-grounded financial-advisor personas can make manager-specific investment expertise portable rather than merely changing an LLM's surface style.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Agentic actor-scorer-patcher loop refines financial advisor personas for LLM alignment
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 智能体驱动循环优化金融顾问角色以实现大模型对齐
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 智能体驱动循环优化金融顾问角色以实现大模型对齐
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 智能体驱动循环优化金融顾问角色以实现大模型对齐
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Fund2Persona grounds financial-advisor personas in fund disclosures and refines them via an agentic loop, improving alignment with fund manager reasoning and portfolio decisions.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 为解决金融大模型顾问角色推理不一致、易漂移的问题，提出Fund2Persona框架，从基金披露、持仓变动、市场背景和经理评论中构建顾问角色，并通过智能体驱动“执行-评分-修正”循环迭代优化。优化后的角色在持仓重构和经理评论对齐任务上优于通用基线，为金融大模型微调与对齐提供了有效方法。

deep_dive.title: A Three-Phase Foundation Model for Tax-Aware Personalized Portfolio Management
deep_dive.abstract: We present a three-phase deep reinforcement learning system for personalized portfolio management that addresses three limitations shared by all prior financial RL work: 1) ticker lock-in, 2) monolithic objectives , and 3) static user models. Phase 1 pretrains a ticker-identity-free cross asset encoder via self-supervised learning on a multi-asset corpus, augmented by a frozen parallel branch using Chronos, a T5-based time series foundation model, fused via a learned gating mechanism. To our knowledge, this is the first application of a time series foundation model to portfolio management RL. The encoder generalizes to any publicly traded asset via a 50-dimensional observable metadata vector that requires no retraining for new tickers. Phase 2 fine-tunes a MoE (Mixture of Experts) portfolio actor critic with PPO under an objective-conditioned reward that simultaneously serves six distinct investment goals sampled per episode: short-term alpha, short-term gain, long-term gain, capital preservation, tax-loss harvesting, and long-term-gains-only. A MoE architecture assigns each objective to a specialized expert head (momentum, growth, defensive, tax-aware), and a learned intent router blends experts based on the active objective and current market regime, which eliminates cross-objective gradient conflict. Phase 3 adds a lightweight personalization layer further adapted at inference time to each individual via a 76-parameter LoRA module fine-tuned on real brokerage transaction history, inferring investment objectives from revealed trading behavior rather than questionnaires. A natural language intent parser converts free-form goals directly into structured investment objective parameters.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Three-phase deep RL for financial portfolio management agents
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 三阶段深度强化学习用于金融投资组合管理智能体
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 三阶段深度强化学习用于金融投资组合管理智能体
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 三阶段深度强化学习用于金融投资组合管理智能体
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a three-phase deep RL system for tax-aware portfolio management, pretraining a cross-asset encoder with a time-series foundation model and then RL training, enabling personalized financial agents.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对金融强化学习中股票锁定、单目标优化和静态用户模型等局限，提出三阶段深度强化学习系统。第一阶段自监督预训练跨资产编码器并融合时序基础模型Chronos；第二阶段进行个性化策略训练。系统可泛化至任意公募资产，实现税务感知的个性化投资组合管理，为金融智能体后训练提供了新的强化学习框架。

deep_dive.title: FinPersona-Bench: A Benchmark for Longitudinal Psychometric Stability of Autonomous Financial Agents
deep_dive.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous financial agents initialized with explicit behavioral mandates such as "preserve capital" or "avoid speculative bets" that are meant to govern every decision throughout deployment. In practice, however, as market context accumulates over long horizons, these mandates gradually lose their behavioral influence, a phenomenon we formalize as Mandate Salience Decay (MSD). To measure MSD objectively, we introduce FinPersona-Bench, a simulation benchmark in which a synthetic market decouples observable price from hidden fundamental value, enabling falsifiable evaluation across three failure modes: trading without signal in calm markets, panic-selling during crashes, and ignoring fundamental value during speculative bubbles. Evaluating 18 leading frontier and open-source LLMs, each assigned one of three behavioral profiles ranging from strict capital preservation to aggressive growth, shows that MSD compounds over time and is model-dependent. In crash scenarios, the behavioral gap between static agents and those receiving periodic mandate re-grounding grows 4.4x from the first to the final quarter of the simulation. The effects of mandate re-grounding are not uniformly positive: it consistently helps conservative agents in low-signal markets but actively worsens behavior for aggressive agents in the same setting. These findings suggest that reliable long-horizon deployment requires selective, mandate-aware re-grounding based on agent profile and market regime.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: benchmarks autonomous financial agent behavioral stability for evaluation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 为自主金融智能体行为稳定性提供基准评估
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 为自主金融智能体行为稳定性提供基准评估
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 为自主金融智能体行为稳定性提供基准评估
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces FinPersona-Bench to measure Mandate Salience Decay in autonomous financial agents, using synthetic markets to evaluate failure modes like panic-selling and no-signal trading over long horizons.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文指出，自主金融智能体在长时间部署中，初步设定的行为指令（如‘保本’或‘避免投机’）会逐渐失去影响力，这种现象称为指令显著性衰减（MSD）。为了客观衡量MSD，论文提出FinPersona-Bench基准，在一个合成市场中将可观测价格与隐藏的基本面价值分离，从而可证伪地评估三种失败模式：平静市场中无信号交易、崩盘时恐慌性抛售等。该基准为金融智能体的行为对齐和后训练优化提供了标准化评估工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文指出，自主金融智能体在长时间部署中，初步设定的行为指令（如‘保本’或‘避免投机’）会逐渐失去影响力，这种现象称为指令显著性衰减（MSD）。为了客观衡量MSD，论文提出FinPersona-Bench基准，在一个合成市场中将可观测价格与隐藏的基本面价值分离，从而可证伪地评估三种失败模式：平静市场中无信号交易、崩盘时恐慌性抛售等。该基准为金融智能体的行为对齐和后训练优化提供了标准化评估工具。

deep_dive.title: Think in English, Answer in Korean: Efficient Adaptation of Multilingual Tool-Using Agents
deep_dive.abstract: We present LuckyStar 111B, a 111B-parameter hybrid reasoning model developed through a collaboration between Cohere and LG CNS for Korean-English enterprise agents under practical memory and serving constraints. The model trains from Cohere's fully post-trained Command A model rather than a new pretraining run, and uses preamble conditioning to switch between concise non-reasoning behavior and longer tool-oriented reasoning. We study four choices for scaling tool-using agents efficiently: multilingual supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards for multi-step tool-use tasks, language-consistency rewards for Korean user-facing responses, and 4-bit quantization for single-GPU serving. The adapted model improves mathematical reasoning, function calling, and agentic natural-language-to-SQL (NL2SQL) performance while preserving general Korean and English instruction-following quality. These results provide a practical recipe and failure-mode analysis for adapting post-trained multilingual models to verifiable agentic workflows under memory-constrained deployment.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: uses multilingual SFT and RL with verifiable rewards for tool-using agent post-training
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 采用多语言监督微调和可验证奖励的强化学习进行工具使用智能体后训练
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 采用多语言监督微调和可验证奖励的强化学习进行工具使用智能体后训练

deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Presents LuckyStar 111B, a hybrid reasoning model post-trained from Command A using multilingual SFT, RL with verifiable rewards for multi-step tool use, and language-consistency rewards, achieving efficient adaptation for Korean-English enterprise agents with 4-bit quantization.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出了LuckyStar 111B，一个基于Cohere Command A模型进行后训练的多语言混合推理模型。通过多语言监督微调、基于可验证奖励的强化学习处理多步工具使用任务、以及韩语响应语言一致性奖励，实现了对韩英企业智能体的高效适配。同时采用4比特量化支持单GPU服务，验证了在受限资源下扩展工具使用智能体的可行性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出了LuckyStar 111B，一个基于Cohere Command A模型进行后训练的多语言混合推理模型。通过多语言监督微调、基于可验证奖励的强化学习处理多步工具使用任务、以及韩语响应语言一致性奖励，实现了对韩英企业智能体的高效适配。同时采用4比特量化支持单GPU服务，验证了在受限资源下扩展工具使用智能体的可行性。

quick_skim.title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
quick_skim.abstract: We introduce Autodata, a general method that enables AI agents to act as data scientists who build high quality training and evaluation data. We show how to train (meta-optimize) such a data scientist agent, so that it learns to create even stronger data. We describe the overall formulation, and a specific practical implementation, Agentic Self-Instruct. We conduct experiments on computer science research tasks, legal reasoning tasks and reasoning with mathematical objects, where we obtain improved results compared to classical synthetic dataset creation methods. Further, meta-optimizing the data scientist agent itself delivers an even larger performance uplift. Agentic data creation provides a way to convert increased inference compute into higher quality model training. Overall, we believe this direction has the potential to change the way we build AI data.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: agentic self-instruct method to create high quality synthetic training data
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 智能体自我指令方法创建高质量合成训练数据
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 智能体自我指令方法创建高质量合成训练数据
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 智能体自我指令方法创建高质量合成训练数据
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Autodata is a meta-optimized agentic data scientist that creates high-quality training data, outperforming classical synthetic dataset methods.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 传统合成数据创建方法难以生成高质量且多样化的训练数据。Autodata将AI智能体训练为数据科学家，通过元优化（Agentic Self-Instruct）使智能体自我改进数据生成能力。实验在法律推理、数学对象推理等任务上取得比传统方法更好的结果，元优化进一步提升性能。这为金融等领域的指令微调提供了高效的数据创建手段。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 传统合成数据创建方法难以生成高质量且多样化的训练数据。Autodata将AI智能体训练为数据科学家，通过元优化（Agentic Self-Instruct）使智能体自我改进数据生成能力。实验在法律推理、数学对象推理等任务上取得比传统方法更好的结果，元优化进一步提升性能。这为金融等领域的指令微调提供了高效的数据创建手段。
